posts.text:
The rich prophetic legacy of my dear brother Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. must not be confined to the mediocre Democratic Party -- social movements of liberation go beyond the corrupt two-party system! #TruthJusticeLove @tavissmiley @MichaelPfleger @RStevenBJacobs @kbla1580

Video

On Friday we honored the life and witness of Jesse Jackson Sr. a freedom fighter who reminded America that justice is what love looks like in public! He stood in the great prophetic tradition—telling the truth, lifting up the poor, and insisting that every child of God has dignity! His voice carried the cry of the marginalized and the hope of a more compassionate democracy! As we reflect today, may we remember that his legacy is not just in history but in the ongoing struggle for spiritual integ

Martin Luther King Jr. said, “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere,” reminding us that as we consistently condemn war, we must also affirm that people have the right to resist oppression and stand against unjust regimes! #TruthJusticeLove @tavissmiley @kbla1580

Video

These were my closing words for my very dear brother Rev. Jessie Jackson Sr. at the tribute lead by my dear brother Tavis Smiley at the historic AME Church in Los Angeles on Friday night February 27th! @tavissmiley @kbla1580 
#RevJessieJacksonSr #TruthJusticeLove

Video

Brother Newsom could’ve taken a humanistic approach! He could’ve said, “I’m just like you. I was born of a woman. I’ll face loss, pain, and death just like anyone else.” But instead, when he thinks of Black people, he brings up low SAT scores. That mindset sits at the core of white supremacy—the belief that Black people are less beautiful, less moral, less intelligent! Don’t play with us like that @CAgovernor !! 
#TruthJusticeLove
@tavissmiley @kbla1580

Video

Jessie Jackson Jr. is a part of the great tradition of Black freedom fighters and Black love warriors with unbelievable courage in the face of terror! He was not an ideologue and it’s important to not to reduce him just as a civil activist! He was a Christian minister, a moral and spiritual force in the face of an empire with moral decadence! 
#RevJessieJacksonJr #TruthJusticeLove @AJEnglish 
piped.video/WHw21qxiWdY

I thank my sister Katie for this candid conversation! @kthalps 
#TruthJusticeLove


Katie Halper (@kthalps)

Katie talks to @CornelWest about the N-wordization of America, Iran and more.

Watch more: piped.video/hHVl8MFRANA

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/kthalps/status/2020287824478548272#m

Every people and nation have the right to resistance and revolution against oppression! Moral consistency requires solidarity with their struggle! Thank you brother @cenkuygur for this candid conversation with me and my beloved wife @AnnahitaMahdavi! @RevolYOUtion #TruthJusticeLove #FreedoForIran  
piped.video/1BjY6Rm7Zkc?si=Orcu…

Black History is the leaven in the American democratic loaf! #BlackHistoryMonth


Annahita Mahdavi West آناهيتا (@AnnahitaMahdavi)

Happy Black History Month 💕
#TruthJusticeLove #BlackHistoryMonth 
@MasterClass

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/AnnahitaMahdavi/status/2018036635833655638#m

How do we learn how to love in the face of this hatred? How do we learn how to fight for freedom for everybody in all parts of town in the face of all of this terror?  #TruthJusticeLove

Video

I would like to thank my dear brother Cyril Vanier for this superb interview! We must remain morally consistent and politically fortified in these grim and dim times! #TruthJusticeLove @VanierCyril @AJEnglish 
piped.video/ZyQ-PUQJxxE?si=2pF6…

Painful moral truths in a narrow ideological-driven world must be heard and heeded! #TruthJusticeLove


Annahita Mahdavi West آناهيتا (@AnnahitaMahdavi)

I received these messages from Iran as some internet connections have come back online.

In the past few weeks, while tens of thousands of Iranians have been slaughtered, countless more have been arrested, disappeared, and erased. Families are screaming into the void while the world looks away.

Heart-shattering videos of people being slaughter

There is an illegal and deeply immoral terrorizing of fellow human beings! Regardless of citizenship or status, they still deserve moral treatment! #AbolishICE  
#TruthJusticeLove

Video

“. . .The response of the radical King to our catastrophic moment can be put in one word: revolution—a revolution in our priorities, a reevaluation of our values, a reinvigoration of our public life, and a fundamental transformation of our way of thinking and living that promotes a transfer of power from oligarchs and plutocrats to everyday people and ordinary citizens. . . . Could it be that we know so little of the radical King because such courage defies our market-driven world?”  
—Cornel We
